About fliptopbattles:
FlipTop Kru Corp. is a self-produced events and artist management company with its first product in the FlipTop Battle League. The FlipTop Battle League is the PhilippinesРђЎ first premier РђЊ and the worldРђЎs most-viewed РђЊ rap battle league. It is popularly credited for the resurgence and widespread acceptance of hiphop culture in the Philippines since its inception in February 2010, and continues to champion all other hiphop elements in its variety of events and online content. It is home to the countryРђЎs top Hiphop talents and houses divisions in the main island groups of Luzon, Visayas, and Mindanao.

Official Lyrics:

Once the last drop of rain has dried off the pavement
Shouldn't I find a stain, but I never do
The way the tires turn stones, on old county roads
They leave Рђўem muddy underneath 
Reminds me of you
You find graffiti on the walls of old bathroom stalls
You know, you can scratch it right off 
It's how it used to be
But like the dollar in your pocket that's been spent and traded in
You can't change where it's been
Reminds me of me

I lived, and I learned
Had you, got burned
Held out, and held on
God knows, too long
And wasted time, lost tears 
Swore that I'd get out of here
But no amount of freedom gets you clean
IРђЎve still got you all over me

The best and worst day of June
Was the one that I met you
With your hands in your pockets
And your Рђўdon't you wish you had meРђЎ grin
But I did, so I smiled, and I melted like a child
Now every breath of air I breathe reminds me of then

And I lived, and I learned 
Had you, got burned
Held out, and held on
God knows, too long
And wasted time, lost tears 
Swore that I'd get out of here
But no amount of freedom gets you clean

snippet.description:
My first unboxing video is here! Plenty of my favorite brands like Kate Spade, Bally, Massimo Dutti and so much more gifts for my 36th birthday from SSI. Enjoy! РЎЦ№ИЈ

LOVE MARIE ONGPAUCO-ESCUDERO (known in the Philippine entertainment industry as Heart Evangelista) started her career at the age of 13 as a commercial model and actress. Her 20 years of hard work paved the way to numerous acting and hosting projects and awards. Through the years, she has evolved from being a professional actor and television host to a sought-after international and local brand endorser, sold-out visual artist, best-selling author, fashion influencer, beauty icon, and entrepreneur. She is one of the countryРђЎs most recognized celebrities, and advocates for childrenРђЎs health and education, individuals with special needs, and animal welfare. She wishes to share these passions with the world through this platform.

snippet.title: UFC 260 Fight Timeline: Miocic vs Ngannou 2
snippet.description:
After their first fight in 2018, Stipe Miocic and Francis Ngannou went down different paths on the road to the rematch. Miocic became embroiled in a trilogy with Daniel Cormier, while Francis Ngannou overcame a disappointing performance at UFC 226 to put on an incredible streak of finishes. Don't miss Miocic vs Ngannou 2 on Saturday, March 27.

snippet.title: Sana'y Di Nalang | (c) Bandang Lapis | #AgsuntaSongRequests ft. Peds Casilihan
snippet.description:
РђюSanaРђЎy di nalang kita nakilala, sanaРђЎy di nalang kita nakasama..РђЮ ­ЪїќРюе­Ъїі

     sino dito ang nakaranas ng magmahal? siguro naman lahat tayo, dumating sa punto ng buhay natin na nahulog at napamahal tayo sa isang certain na tao na nagparamdam satin kung pano ang maging masaya, kung pano mawala lahat ng pangamba at takot sa puso natin at kung pano yung pagmamahal na halos wala nang natitira para sa sarili natin, kaso minsan.... di naman tayo pare parehas, minsan may happy ending, kaso minsan meron ding ending na di natin inaasahan, ung mismong taong nagturo sayo pano maging masaya, pano mawala ang takot, at pano magmahal ng lubus lubusan, minsan yun pa talaga ung taong mag bibigay nang doble doble at patong patong na sakit sa puso natin, na king minsan ay hinihiling nalang natin sa universe na sana di nalang natin na meet yung taong yun, pero sabe nga nila minsan may mga taong dadaan lang para turuan tayo at para mag grow tayo, diba? ikaw? meron kabang naiisip habang binabasa mo ito? o diba? andiyan ka parin naman, buhay  at humihinga kung di mo napagdaanan lahat ng napagdaanan mo, marahil wala ka sa punto ng buhay mo ngayon diba? maaaring nasaktan nila tayo pero what doesnРђЎt kill you makes you stronger nga diba? kaya naman heto isa sa mga most requested songs sa aming Agsunta Song Requests heto ang aming version ng РђюSanaРђЎy di nalangРђЮ ng @Bandang Lapis  kasama ang matagal na naming kaibigan at nakasama sa ilang agsunta jam sessions namin walang iba kundi ang maestro na si Peds Casilihan!

localized.description:
РђюSanaРђЎy di nalang kita nakilala, sanaРђЎy di nalang kita nakasama..РђЮ ­ЪїќРюе­Ъїі

     sino dito ang nakaranas ng magmahal? siguro naman lahat tayo, dumating sa punto ng buhay natin na nahulog at napamahal tayo sa isang certain na tao na nagparamdam satin kung pano ang maging masaya, kung pano mawala lahat ng pangamba at takot sa puso natin at kung pano yung pagmamahal na halos wala nang natitira para sa sarili natin, kaso minsan.... di naman tayo pare parehas, minsan may happy ending, kaso minsan meron ding ending na di natin inaasahan, ung mismong taong nagturo sayo pano maging masaya, pano mawala ang takot, at pano magmahal ng lubus lubusan, minsan yun pa talaga ung taong mag bibigay nang doble doble at patong patong na sakit sa puso natin, na king minsan ay hinihiling nalang natin sa universe na sana di nalang natin na meet yung taong yun, pero sabe nga nila minsan may mga taong dadaan lang para turuan tayo at para mag grow tayo, diba? ikaw? meron kabang naiisip habang binabasa mo ito? o diba? andiyan ka parin naman, buhay  at humihinga kung di mo napagdaanan lahat ng napagdaanan mo, marahil wala ka sa punto ng buhay mo ngayon diba? maaaring nasaktan nila tayo pero what doesnРђЎt kill you makes you stronger nga diba? kaya naman heto isa sa mga most requested songs sa aming Agsunta Song Requests heto ang aming version ng РђюSanaРђЎy di nalangРђЮ ng @Bandang Lapis  kasama ang matagal na naming kaibigan at nakasama sa ilang agsunta jam sessions namin walang iba kundi ang maestro na si Peds Casilihan!

snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgiaРђІРђІ

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances.

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagramРђІРђІ
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebookРђІРђІ
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficialРђІРђІ
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitterРђІРђІ
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtubeРђІРђІ

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipaРђІ #FutureNostalgiaРђІ #Grammys

Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebookРђІРђІ
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficialРђІРђІ
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitterРђІРђІ
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtubeРђІРђІ

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipaРђІ #FutureNostalgiaРђІ #Grammys

snippet.title: Why you can't compare Covid-19 vaccines
snippet.description:
What a vaccine's "efficacy rate" actually means.

Sign up for our newsletter: http://www.vox.com/video-newsletter

In the US, the first two available Covid-19 vaccines were the ones from Pfizer/BioNTech and Moderna. Both vaccines have very high "efficacy rates," of around 95%. But the third vaccine introduced in the US, from Johnson & Johnson, has a considerably lower efficacy rate: just 66%.

Look at those numbers next to each other, and it's natural to conclude that one of them is considerably worse. Why settle for 66% when you can have 95%? But that isn't the right way to understand a vaccine's efficacy rate, or even to understand what a vaccine does. And public health experts say that if you really want to know which vaccine is the best one, efficacy isn't actually the most important number at all.

Further reading from Vox:

Why comparing Covid-19 vaccine efficacy numbers can be misleading: https://www.vox.com/22311625/covid-19-vaccine-efficacy-johnson-moderna-pfizer

The vaccine metric that matters more than efficacy: https://www.vox.com/22273502/covid-vaccines-pfizer-moderna-johnson-astrazeneca-efficacy-deaths

The limits of what vaccine efficacy numbers can tell us: https://www.vox.com/21575420/oxford-moderna-pfizer-covid-19-vaccine-trial-biontech-astrazeneca-results

Vox.com is a news website that helps you cut through the noise and understand what's really driving the events in the headlines. Check out http://www.vox.com.

Watch our full video catalog: http://goo.gl/IZONyE
Follow Vox on Facebook: http://goo.gl/U2g06o
Or Twitter: http://goo.gl/XFrZ5H

snippet.title: TWICE JAPAN 8th SINGLEсђјKura KuraсђЈTeaser JEONGYEON
snippet.description:
TWICE JAPAN 8th SINGLEсђјKura KuraсђЈ№╝ѕУфГсЂ┐№╝џсѓ»сЃЕсѓ»сЃЕ№╝Ѕсѓњ5Тюѕ12ТЌЦсЂФсЃфсЃфсЃ╝сѓ╣Т▒║т«џ№╝Ђ

сђїKura KuraсђЇсЂ»TWICEсЂ«сЃЌсЃГсЃЄсЃЦсЃ╝сѓхсЃ╝J.Y. ParkсЂїСйюУЕъсѓњТІЁтйЊсђѓ
сђїтљЏсђЇсЂФтЄ║С╝џсЂБсЂЪуъгжќЊсђЂжГћТ│ЋсЂФсЂІсЂЉсѓЅсѓїС║їС║║сЂасЂЉсЂ«СИќуЋїсЂФтљИсЂёУЙ╝сЂЙсѓїсЂЪсЂІсЂ«сѓѕсЂєсЂФсђЂсђїтљЏсђЇсЂ«жГЁтіЏсЂФсѓ»сЃЕсѓ»сЃЕсЂЎсѓІсЂ╗сЂЕТЂІсЂФУљйсЂАсѓІсђѓсђїтљЏсђЇсЂЌсЂІУдІсЂѕсЂфсЂЈсЂфсѓісђЂтЁеУ║ФсЂДтцбСИГсЂФсЂфсѓІтД┐сѓњТГїсЂБсЂЪСИђТЏ▓сЂесЂЌсЂдсђЂТЃ│тЃЈсЂ«СИГсЂДсЂ«ТЂІсЂїт░ЉсЂЌсЂџсЂцуЈЙт«ЪуџёсЂфТЂІсЂФтцЅсѓЈсЂБсЂдсЂёсЂЈтД┐сѓњУАеуЈЙсЂЌсЂЪсђѓ
TWICEсЂ«ТЌЦТюгсЂ«СйютЊЂсЂесЂЌсЂдсЂ»С╗ісЂЙсЂДсЂФсЂфсЂёсђїТёЏсђЇсЂ«тйбсѓњТГїсЂёсђЂуЏісђЁТѕљжЋисЂЌсЂдсЂёсѓІсЃфсѓбсЃФсЂфтй╝тЦ│сЂЪсЂАсЂ«тД┐сЂїжГЁсЂЏсѓЅсѓїсѓІТЦйТЏ▓сђѓ

#TWICE #KuraKura

snippet.title: President Biden falls on Air Force One stairs
snippet.description:
President Joe Biden has fallen on the stairs of Air Force One while boarding the aircraft.

Mr Biden, who was on his way to Atlanta, appeared unhurt and carried on unaided.

snippet.title: Magkaagaw: Checkmate, Veron! | Episode 152
snippet.description:
Aired (March 22, 2021): Sa pag-aakala ni Veron na makikipag-ayos na si Gilda sa kanya, tila naipit sa kumunoy ang una dahil pinagkaisahan na siya ng lahat upang ilantad ang lahat ng kanyang baho.

Catch the latest episodes of 'Magkaagaw' Mondays to Saturdays at 2:30 PM on GMA Afternoon Prime, starring Sunshine Dizon as Laura, Sheryl Cruz as Veron, Jeric Gonzales as Jio, and Klea Pineda as Clarisse. Also in the cast are Isay Alvarez, Dennis Padilla, Polo Ravales, Lovely Abella, Joana Marie Tan, Dion Ignacio, and Patricia Tumulak. #MagkaagawGMA

ABOUT EAT BULAGA
Eat Bulaga! (or EB) is the longest noon-time variety show in the Philippines produced by Television And Production Exponents Inc. (TAPE) and currently aired by GMA Network. The show broadcasts from the new APT Studios at the No. 80 Marcos Highway, San Isidro, Cainta, 1900, Rizal. Eat Bulaga! is aired Weekdays at 12:00pm to 2:35pm and Saturdays at 11:30am to 2:45pm (PHT).

Due to continued Community Quarantine guidelines amidst COVID-19 pandemic, live studio audience reservation is suspended.

#EatBulaga #Dabarkads

snippet.description:
Since a lot of you have been requesting for me to do another walk-in closet tour, I thought I would instead walk you through some of my favorite pieces in my closet at the moment! These are the things that IРђЎve worked hard for over the years and the stories behind each purchase. Enjoy and watch out for Part 2! ­ЪўЅ

LOVE MARIE ONGPAUCO-ESCUDERO (known in the Philippine entertainment industry as Heart Evangelista) started her career at the age of 13 as a commercial model and actress. Her 20 years of hard work paved the way to numerous acting and hosting projects and awards. Through the years, she has evolved from being a professional actor and television host to a sought-after international and local brand endorser, sold-out visual artist, best-selling author, fashion influencer, beauty icon, and entrepreneur. She is one of the countryРђЎs most recognized celebrities, and advocates for childrenРђЎs health and education, individuals with special needs, and animal welfare. She wishes to share these passions with the world through this platform.

snippet.title: INA NG BINATILYO SA VIRAL VIDEO NA INIHAGIS SA SWIMMING POOL, NAGPA-TULFO!
snippet.description:
MAHALAGANG PAALALA:

Muli po naming pinapaalala na hanggang ngayon ay SARADO PA RIN PO ANG AMING ACTION CENTER sa TV5 Media Center, Reliance Street, Mandaluyong City.

Hindi pa rin po maaaring pumunta nang personal ang mga complainant para magreklamo kay Idol Raffy dahil sa ating kinahaharap na pandemya at mahigpit pa ring ipinapatupad ang mga safety measures upang maging ligtas ang lahat.

Gayunpaman, puwede ninyong i-PM ang inyong mga sumbong sa OFFICIAL Facebook page ni Idol na RAFFY TULFO IN ACTION na may mahigit 15 MILLION Followers. Nakahanda pong tumugon sa inyo ang RTIA researchers.

Maraming salamat sa inyong pag-unawa at mag-ingat po tayong lahat!

snippet.title: TURNING 36 PART 1: TOP 10 LIFE LESSONS IРђЎVE LEARNED SO FAR | Heart Evangelista
snippet.description:
Like many other people, I have long felt the pressure of figuring out life by a certain age. But as I learned, the lessons you carry with you through the years are just as important. РЎЦ№ИЈ

LOVE MARIE ONGPAUCO-ESCUDERO (known in the Philippine entertainment industry as Heart Evangelista) started her career at the age of 13 as a commercial model and actress. Her 20 years of hard work paved the way to numerous acting and hosting projects and awards. Through the years, she has evolved from being a professional actor and television host to a sought-after international and local brand endorser, sold-out visual artist, best-selling author, fashion influencer, beauty icon, and entrepreneur. She is one of the countryРђЎs most recognized celebrities, and advocates for childrenРђЎs health and education, individuals with special needs, and animal welfare. She wishes to share these passions with the world through this platform.

The official YouTube channel of Atlantic Records artist Bruno Mars. 11x GRAMMY Award winner and 27x GRAMMY Award nominee Bruno Mars is a celebrated singer, songwriter, producer, and musician with iconic hits like "The Lazy Song", "That's What I Like", "Just The Way You Are", "24K Magic", "Locked Out Of Heaven", and "When I Was Your Man". His legendary body of work also includes blockbuster albums such as Doo-Wops & Hooligans, Unorthodox Jukebox, and 24K Magic, as well as era-defining collaborations like "Uptown Funk" with Mark Ronson, "Finesse" with Cardi B, and "Nothin' On You" with B.o.B. Forever classic, yet supremely innovative, Bruno continues to redefine music, style, and popular culture, pushing the boundaries of pop, R&B, funk, soul, hip-hop, and dance, and remains as influential as ever.
